latest_signal.trigger_plan: Enter only when breakout direction, OI expansion, liquidity, and breakoutContinuation score align.
latest_signal.invalidation_plan: Exit on dynamic stop, OI confirmation loss, 15m reversal, no-progress after 25m, or 90m time stop.

invalidation: Exit if the dynamic stop is touched.
Exit if OI contracts materially after entry.
Exit if breakout direction reverses on the 15 minute window.
Exit if the trade has no progress after 25 minutes.
Exit after 90 minutes if target is not reached.

notes: Gateway snapshot replay for Breakout OI Confirmation.
Uses price displacement, OI expansion, liquidity, funding context, crowding bias, and setup scores already persisted in market_snapshots.
No raw orderbook or trade-aggression claim is made in v1.
Passing validation only permits paper review; this is not a live-trading route.
